action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Cold food item held above 41º F (smoked fish and reduced oxygen packaged foods above 38 ºF) except during necessary preparation.
Food not protected from potential source of contamination during storage, preparation, transportation, display or service.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Wiping cloths not stored clean and dry, or in a sanitizing solution, between uses.
